steps.action: Create an isolated project and interview, then open /dashboard/interviews?projectId=7&new=true
steps.expected: Interview card renders with an Edit control
steps.observed: The new interview card rendered with an Edit button alongside Analyze with AI and Delete actions.

steps.action: Click the interview card Edit button
steps.expected: Editable form opens pre-populated with the current interview title and transcript
steps.observed: The card switched into edit mode, showing Save changes/Cancel buttons and the existing title/transcript already filled in.

evidence.network: No API call is required to open the edit form.

assertions.title: Interview edit submits PUT and updates UI

steps.action: From the pre-populated edit form, replace the title and transcript with valid values
steps.expected: Form accepts the edits and is ready to submit
steps.observed: Updated values were entered without validation errors.

steps.expected: Browser sends PUT /api/interviews/:id and the card updates in place without reloading the page
steps.observed: A single PUT /api/interviews/2 request returned 200, the card title changed to 'Edited support workflow interview', status remained pending, and the injected window marker persisted, showing no full page reload.

evidence.network: PUT /api/interviews/2 -> 200; request body contained the edited title/transcript; page stayed on /dashboard/interviews?projectId=7&new=true and updated in place.

assertions.title: Interview edit preserves analysis status

steps.action: Attempt to analyze the isolated interview before testing an edit on an analyzed record
steps.expected: Interview becomes analyzed so title-only editing can verify status/summary/insights preservation
steps.observed: POST /api/interviews/2/analyze returned 500 and the page showed 'Anthropic API key not configured'; the interview remained pending with no summary or insights.

assertions.issues: Blocked because this environment has no Anthropic API key, so an analyzed interview could not be produced within the isolated account and the analyzed-status preservation path could not be exercised.

steps.action: Open the edit form and clear both the title and transcript fields
steps.expected: Client-side validation should reject invalid values
steps.observed: Both fields were emptied successfully before submission.

steps.expected: Inline validation errors appear and no PUT request is sent
steps.observed: Inline errors appeared for both fields ('Title must be at least 3 characters' and 'Transcript must be at least 50 characters') and the recorded request list remained empty.

evidence.network: No network request fired after invalid submit; recorded request list stayed [].

frictions.description: After onboarding completed, the app redirected directly to /dashboard/projects/new instead of /dashboard, so project creation started immediately before reaching the interview flow.
frictions.resolution: Used the redirected project creation page to create isolated test data, then continued to the interview route.

blockers.description: AI analysis is unavailable in this environment because the Anthropic API key is not configured.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted Analyze with AI from the interview card; POST /api/interviews/2/analyze returned 500 with 'Anthropic API key not configured'.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-DATA-005, VAL-DATA-006, VAL-FORM-009) and 1 was blocked (VAL-DATA-007) because analyzed interviews cannot be created without the Anthropic API key.
